zh.Old Buckenham, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可笛卡爾 巴肯哈姆
zh.All Saints' Church, Old Buckenham, Norfo: 英國諾福爾可笛卡爾 巴肯哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Canne於1550年出生在英國諾福爾可笛卡爾 巴肯哈姆時，他的父親William Canne25歲，母親Wilburga Catesby35歲。他於1574年與Rebecca Plowman在英國諾福爾可笛卡爾 巴肯哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1597年4月在他的家鄉享年47歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可。

zh-hans.Old Buckenham, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可笛卡爾 巴肯哈姆
zh-hans.All Saints' Church, Old Buckenham, Norfo: 英国諾福爾可笛卡爾 巴肯哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Canne于1550年出生在英国諾福爾可笛卡爾 巴肯哈姆时，他的父亲William Canne25岁，母亲Wilburga Catesby35岁。他于1574年与Rebecca Plowman在英国諾福爾可笛卡爾 巴肯哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1597年4月在他的家乡享年47岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Canne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: either a shortened variant of McCann or of McCanny, which is an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Annaidh ‘son of Annadh’ (a personal name of uncertain meaning). In their Anglicized forms the two surnames were confused.
Irish: from Ó Caithniadh ‘son of Caithnia’, a personal name meaning ‘battle champion’, Anglicized as Caheny or Canny.

variants.name: McCann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Malachy, Donovan, Liam, Aidan, Aileen, Brigid, Colum, Conan, Donal, Kiernan, Ronan.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cana ‘son of Cana’, a personal name based on cana ‘wolf cub’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Canne was born in 1550, in Old Buckenham, Norfolk, England, his father, William Canne, was 25 and his mother, Wilburga Catesby, was 35. He married Rebecca Plowman in 1574, in Old Buckenham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in April 1597, in his hometown, at the age of 47, and was buried in Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Canne est né en 1550, à Old Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, William Canne, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Wilburga Catesby, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Rebecca Plowman en 1574, à Old Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en avril 1597, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Canne 1550 in Old Buckenham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Canne 25 und seine Mutter Wilburga Catesby 35. Er hat 1574 in Old Buckenham, Norfolk, England Rebecca Plowman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im April 1597 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Canne è nato il nel 1550 nel Old Buckenham, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, William Canne, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Wilburga Catesby, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Rebecca Plowman nel 1574, nel Old Buckenham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1597, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Norfolk, England.

ja.Old Buckenham, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクオルド ブクエンハム
ja.Old Buckingham, Norfolk, Englamd: イギリスノーフォルク
ja.All Saints' Church, Old Buckenham, Norfo: イギリスノーフォルクオルド ブクエンハム
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Canneが1550年にイギリスノーフォルクオルド ブクエンハムで生まれた時，父William Canneは25歳，母Wilburga Catesbyは35歳であった。1574年にイギリスノーフォルクオルド ブクエンハムでRebecca Plowmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1597年4月に故郷で47歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Canne(이)가 1550년 영국 노르폴크 드 벅함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Canne(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Wilburga Catesby(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1574년 영국 노르폴크 드 벅함에서 Rebecca Plowman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1597년 4월 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Canne nasceu em 1550, em Old Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Canne, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Wilburga Catesby, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Rebecca Plowman em 1574, em Old Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em abril de 1597, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Canne родился в 1550 г. в местности олд буккенам, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William Canne было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Wilburga Catesby, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Rebecca Plowman в 1574 г. в местности олд буккенам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер апрель 1597 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Canne nació en 1550, en Old Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Canne, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Wilburga Catesby, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Rebecca Plowman en 1574, en Old Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en abril de 1597, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Norfolk, Inglaterra.
